expectations.evidence: Read resource: deriva://feature/Image/Diagnosis (line 10, reiterated in summary table at line 86)
Explains term_columns with required: true/false, lists required_fields, and gives example: 'Diagnosis_Type (required)' and 'confidence (optional, float4)' at lines 15-26
Read resource: deriva://vocabulary/Diagnosis_Type (line 33), returns all terms e.g. Normal, Abnormal, Suspected Glaucoma
Shows both add_feature_value (lines 57-63) for simple features and add_feature_value_record (lines 68-74) for multi-column features with correct parameters
Step 3 heading: 'Add Labels Within an Execution', shows create_execution/start_execution/stop_execution sequence (lines 49-78), notes 'One execution per logical task' (line 100)
